news.headline: Compass Minerals to discuss Q4 and fiscal 2024 results on Dec 17, 2024, at 10:00 a.m. ET, with the president and CEO.
news.summary: Leading global essential minerals provider Compass Minerals (NYSE: CMP) is set to announce its fourth-quarter and fiscal 2024 results on December 16, 2024, after market closing. President and CEO Edward C. Dowling Jr. and CFO Jeffrey Cathey will host a conference call on December 17, starting at 10:00 a.m. ET to discuss these results. Interested parties can join the call through a webcast on investors.compassminerals.com or by dialing in.

news.headline: Bitfarms restates financial statements, as per amended prospectus supplement dated October 4, 2024.
news.summary: This information is considered a "designated news release" specified in the Company's amended and restated prospectus supplement from October 4, 2024, related to its short form base shelf prospectus issued on November 10, 2023.

news.headline: Results from Lilly's pirtobrutinib show 46% reduction in disease progression vs. current treatments. Median 23.9 months delay in next treatment or death.
news.summary: New data from the BRUIN CLL-321 study reveals that Lilly's pirtobrutinib demonstrated a 46% decrease in the risk of disease progression or mortality when compared to treatment regimens involving idelalisib plus rituximab or bendamustine plus rituximab. Pirtobrutinib also extended the median time before the need for additional treatment or death to 23.9 months, contrasted with 10.9 months in the comparison groups.

news.headline: Odronextamab shows promising results in earlier lines of lymphoma treatment, with complete responses in all evaluable patients with untreated follicular lymphoma in Phase 3 trial. #ASH2021
news.summary: Initial findings from the safety lead-in portion of the confirmatory Phase 3 OLYMPIA-1 trial revealed that odronextamab monotherapy resulted in complete responses in every patient with previously untreated follicular lymphoma who were included in the efficacy evaluation. These promising results indicate a significant efficacy of odronextamab in this patient population.

news.headline: MicroStrategy's investors bear the burden of additional bitcoin purchases.
Trump's proposed tariffs may impact Dollar Tree stores, with prices already raised to $1.25 due to inflation. Company prepared for potential price hikes.
news.summary: The proposal by Donald Trump to impose tariffs on imports from China, Canada, and Mexico could impact products and prices at American dollar stores. Dollar Tree Inc (NASDAQ: DLTR) has already raised prices from $1 to $1.25 due to inflation. The potential tariffs may lead to further price increases in Dollar Tree stores or changes in product selection. Company officials, including COO and Interim CEO Mike Creedon, are preparing for various scenarios. Dollar Tree had negotiated lower costs with suppliers in 2018 and 2019 to mitigate potential impacts. This development could affect the affordability of items typically priced at $1 or less in dollar stores.

news.headline: TScan Therapeutics to update Phase 1 Heme Trial data at ASH Meeting; HR 0.30 for event-free survival. HR 0.28 for relapse.
news.summary: At present, the treatment arm shows a significant advantage in event-free survival with a hazard ratio of 0.30 and a p-value of 0.04. Additionally, patients in the treatment arm display a decreasing likelihood of relapse with a hazard ratio of 0.28 and a p-value of 0.14.

news.headline: 'OverTrip' battle royale shooter now on Epic Games Store post Solana token launch, featuring meme coin gambling.
news.summary: OverTrip, a shooter game integrated with cryptocurrency, is now available on the Epic Games Store. The game introduces a new battle royale mode, allowing players to wager meme coins while playing. The game has garnered attention since its release with a growing player base and a significant increase in transactions involving meme coins. This innovative feature has attracted many gamers, resulting in a surge of downloads and in-game purchases.

TGM mourns the death of Co-founder Steven C. Macy (1949-2024); remembers him as a beloved figure.
news.summary: On December 9, 2024, TGM announced the passing of Steven C. Macy, their Co-founder and Managing Principal, who was born in 1949 and passed away in 2024. Steve, a respected real estate executive, was remembered as a beloved husband, brother, uncle, friend, mentor, and proud parent and grandparent. His wisdom and guidance will be greatly missed by all who knew him.

The company is set to release its first-ever CGC Signature Series collectible cards, generating significant buzz in the industry. This move aims to capitalize on the growing market for unique and high-quality collectible cards.

news.headline: Rising cases of blood disorders like anemia, affecting 2 billion globally. Ongoing research aims to address the silent epidemic.
news.summary: Millions of people worldwide are impacted by blood disorders, with approximately 5% of the global population grappling with conditions such as anemia. The prevalence of anemia alone affects over 2 billion individuals globally. This silent epidemic is commonly linked to factors like iron deficiency or chronic illnesses. Ongoing research efforts aim to tackle the challenges posed by these widespread conditions.

news.headline: Owners of CHS elect 5 board members in St. Paul. Terms for 3 years. Meeting held in December 2024.
news.summary: At the annual meeting in early December, CHS owners in St. Paul, Minnesota, voted to elect five board members to serve three-year terms.

news.headline: Oracle Q2 earnings: Revenue $14.06B (missed), EPS $1.47 (missed), cloud revenue up 24%, Ellison optimistic about AI growth.
news.summary: Oracle Corporation (NYSE:ORCL) released its second-quarter financial results, showcasing a 9% increase in revenue to $14.06 billion, slightly below the expected $14.11 billion. Adjusted earnings per share were reported at $1.47, missing the consensus estimate by $0.01. Cloud revenue saw a significant boost, reaching $5.9 billion, up 24% from last year. Cloud services and license support revenues also jumped to $10.8 billion, a 12% increase, while cloud license and on-premise revenues grew by 1% to $1.2 billion. The surge in AI demand was credited for driving Oracle Cloud Infrastructure revenue growth.

news.headline: C3.ai stock surges after Q2 results: revenue hits $94.34M, 86% from subscriptions ($81.2M), up 22% YoY.
news.summary: C3.ai, Inc. (NYSE:AI) released its Q2 earnings post-market on Monday. The company reported a loss of $0.06 per share, surpassing the expected loss of $0.16 per share. Q2 revenue stood at $94.34 million, exceeding the anticipated $91.02 million and marking a rise from $73.23 million the previous year. Subscription revenue for the quarter hit $81.2 million, accounting for 86% of total revenue and marking a 22% increase from $66.4 million in the same period last year. Subscription and prioritized engineering services revenue combined totaled $90.8 million.

news.headline: AT&T's CEO to update shareholders at UBS conference, discussing strategic growth plan for best connectivity in America. Key numbers: 300 million+ people covered by 5G by 2026, 50 million+ locations to have fiber by 2029.
news.summary: Tomorrow, AT&T's CEO will discuss the company's multi-year strategic growth plan at the UBS Global Media & Communications Conference, focusing on customer-centric approach and network investment. The plan aims to position AT&T as the top connectivity provider in America by the end of the decade. By 2027, the company plans to have modernized its 5G wireless network with open technology, covering over 300 million people with mid-band 5G spectrum. Additionally, they aim to expand their fiber broadband network to over 50 million locations by 2029. These investments align with AT&T's commitment to meet financial and operational goals set during their 2024 Analyst & Investor Day.

news.headline: MongoDB shares rose after reporting Q3 earnings: $1.16 EPS, $529.4M revenue, beating estimates. Subscription revenue up 22%.
news.summary: After market close on Monday, MongoDB, Inc. (NASDAQ: MDB) released its third-quarter results. The company reported earnings of $1.16 per share, surpassing the analyst estimate of 69 cents. Quarterly revenue stood at $529.4 million, exceeding the consensus prediction of $497.75 million and marking a rise from the previous year's $432.938 million. Subscription revenue experienced a 22% year-over-year increase, reaching $512.2 million, while services revenue saw an 18% year-over-year rise to $17.2 million. Non-GAAP gross profit hit $405.7 million.

news.headline: Toll Brothers beats Q4 expectations with $4.63 EPS and $3.33B revenue, up from $3.02B last year.Stats for Q1 look weak.

Revenue for the quarter was $3.33 billion, also exceeding the predicted $3.17 billion. This marks a rise from last year's sales of $3.02 billion. Home sales revenues reached $3.26 billion, showing a 10% growth from the previous year's fourth quarter. The number of delivered homes amounted to 3,431, a 25% increase. Additionally, the net signed contract value totaled $2.66 billion. More information is available on Benzinga.com.

The report revealed adjusted losses of $0.02 per share and a third-quarter revenue of $61.26 million, exhibiting growth from $55.38 million in the corresponding period the previous year. Notably, 97% of the company's Annual Contract Value (ACV) was identified as recurring during the third quarter. Furthermore, the End of Period (EoP) Customer Count saw a 4% rise year-over-year, reaching 1,015 customers. For more information, the complete story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: 92nd anniversary of Hollywood Christmas Parade supporting Marine Toys for Tots will air on CW Network on Dec 14, 2024 at 8pm ET/PT. Jeremy Renner to lead as Grand Marshal along with hosts Dean Cain & Laura McKenzie, and musical acts.
news.summary: A two-hour primetime television special is set to air on The CW Network on Saturday, December 14, 2024, at 8:00 p.m. ET/PT. The parade will be led by Grand Marshal Jeremy Renner, with hosts Dean Cain and Laura McKenzie. Joining them will be Montel Williams and Elizabeth Stanton. The event will feature 20 musical acts and performing groups.

news.headline: Vecima cuts workforce by 12% to boost efficiency and align with customer needs, focusing on profitable growth.

This strategic move is designed to better fit the needs of customers and improve the overall operational efficiency of the company.

news.summary: President-elect Donald J. Trump has been seen capitalizing on various opportunities, such as a recent interaction with Jill Biden at Notre-Dame. This incident reflects a pattern of commercializing his associations, with this event being just one example of that behavior.
